title: Polyamide compositions comprising a thermoplastic polymer
abstract: In an embodiment, a polyamide composition comprises an anionically polymerized polyamide; and a thermoplastic polymer. In another embodiment, a method of making a polyamide composition comprises anionically polymerizing a monomer mixture comprising a cyclic lactam monomer, a thermoplastic polymer, a catalyst, and an activator to form the polyamide composition. The Hildebrand solubility factor of the anionically polymerized polyamide can be within 15% of the Hildebrand solubility factor of the thermoplastic polymer.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A polyamide composition, comprising: an anionically polymerized polyamide; and a thermoplastic polymer; wherein the Hildebrand solubility factor of the anionically polymerized polyamide is within 15% of the Hildebrand solubility factor of the thermoplastic polymer. 2. The polyamide composition of Claim 1, wherein the polyamide composition comprises 5 to 50 wt% of the thermoplastic polymer based on a total weight of the polyamide composition. 3. The polyamide composition of any one or more of the preceding claims, wherein the polyamide composition has a crystallinity of 20 to 45 wt% as determined using differential scanning calorimetry. 4. The polyamide composition of any one or more of the preceding claims, wherein the polyamide composition has a coefficient of linear thermal expansion that is less than a corresponding coefficient of linear thermal expansion of a comparison polyamide composition formed in the absence of the thermoplastic polymer. 5. The polyamide composition of any one or more of the preceding claims, wherein the polyamide composition has a coefficient of linear thermal expansion of less than HOxlO "5 Â°c- 6. The polyamide composition of any one or more of the preceding claims, wherein the Hildebrand solubility factor of the anionically polymerized polyamide is within 5% of the Hildebrand solubility factor of the thermoplastic polymer. 7. The polyamide composition of any one or more of the preceding claims, wherein the thermoplastic polymer comprises a poly(ether imide), a poly(ether ketone), a poly(ether ether ketone), a poly( ether ketone ketone), a poly(ether sulfone), a poly(ether ether sulfone), or a combination comprising at least one of the foregoing. 8. The polyamide composition of any one or more of the preceding claims, wherein the thermoplastic polymer comprises a poly(ether imide), a poly(ether ether sulfone), or a combination comprising at least one of the foregoing. 9. The polyamide composition of any one or more of the preceding claims, wherein the anionically polymerized polyamide has a weight average molecular weight of 

 2,000 to 100,000 Daltons as measured by gel permeation chromatography based on polystyrene standards. 10. The polyamide composition of any one or more of the preceding claims, wherein the anionically polymerized polyamide is derived from a cyclic lactam monomer comprising Î²-propiolactam, Î³-butyrolactam, Î´-valerolactam, Îµ-caprolactam, enantholactam, caprylolactam, laurolactam, Î²,Î²-dimethylpropiolactam, Î±,Î±-dimethylpropiolactam, amylolactam, or a combination comprising at least one of the foregoing. 11. The polyamide composition of any one or more of the preceding claims, wherein the polyamide composition further comprises an additional polymer different from the anionically polymerized polyamide and the thermoplastic polymer. 12. The polyamide composition of Claim 11, wherein the additional polymer comprises a polyacetal, a polyolefin, a polyacrylic, a polycarbonate, a polystyrene, a polyester, a second polyamide, a polyamideimide, a polyarylate, a polyarylsulfone, a polyphenylene sulfide, a polyvinyl chloride, a polysulfone, a polyimide, a polyfluoroethylene, a polybenzoxazole, a polyphthalide, a polyacetal, a polyanhydride, a polyvinyl ether, a polyvinyl thioether, a polyvinyl alcohol, a polyvinyl ketone, a polyvinyl halide, a polyvinyl nitrile, a polyvinyl ester, a polysulfonate, a polysulfide, a polythioester, a polysulfone, a polysulfonamide, a polyurea, a polyphosphazene, a polysilazane, a polyphenylene oxide, or a combination comprising at least one of the foregoing. 13. The polyamide composition of any one or more of the preceding claims, wherein the polyamide composition further comprises an additive. 14. A method of making any one or more of the preceding polyamide compositions, comprising: anionically polymerizing a monomer mixture comprising a cyclic lactam monomer, the thermoplastic polymer, a catalyst, and an activator to form the polyamide composition. 15. The method of Claim 14, wherein the cyclic lactam monomer comprises Î²- propiolactam, Î³-butyro lactam, Î´-valerolactam, Îµ-caprolactam, enantholactam, caprylolactam, laurolactam, Î²,Î²-dimethylpropiolactam, Î±,Î±-dimethylpropiolactam, amylolactam, or a combination comprising at least one of the foregoing. 16. The method of any one or more of Claims 14 to 15, wherein the monomer mixture comprises 5 to 50 wt% of the thermoplastic polymer dissolved in the monomer mixture prior to the anionically polymerizing. 17. The method of any one or more of Claims 14 to 16, wherein the monomer mixture comprises 1 to 6 wt% of the catalyst based on the total weight of the monomer mixture. 18. The method of any one or more of Claims 14 to 17, wherein the monomer mixture comprises 1 to 4 wt% of the activator based on the total weight of the monomer mixture. 19. The method of any one or more of Claims 14 to 18, wherein the anionically polymerizing comprises reaction injection molding or resin transfer molding the monomer mixture. 20. An article comprising the polyamide composition of any one or more of the preceding claims.
